## User <sup>7/21/2026, 1:16:50 PM</sup>

Read CLAUDE.md, docs/PLAN.md, and the hungarian-vat skill (SKILL.md + 
references/architecture.md) before writing anything. This session is Phase 3, 
step 1: scaffold the entire solution as a walking skeleton. Structure only — 
no VAT business logic yet (no parsers, no validation rules, no strategy math). 
That comes in the next session.

DELIVERABLES OF THIS SESSION

1. Repository layout exactly as defined in references/architecture.md:
   - VatDesk.sln with src/VatDesk.Core, src/VatDesk.Infrastructure, 
     src/VatDesk.Api (.NET 8), tests/VatDesk.Tests (xUnit)
   - frontend/ — React 18 + TypeScript via Vite, with the folder conventions 
     from the skill (src/api/types.ts placeholder included)
   - Enforce the dependency direction in the .csproj references: 
     Api → Infrastructure → Core; Core references nothing external.

2. Walking skeleton that proves every seam works end to end:
   - EF Core + Npgsql wired, DbContext with the four tables from the skill's 
     persistence schema (entities + initial migration; migrations auto-apply 
     on startup)
   - GET /api/health returning app version + DB connectivity status
   - One placeholder Core abstraction file per interface named in the skill 
     (IInvoiceParser, IVatCategoryRegistry, IVatDeclarationStrategy, 
     IReportRenderer) — signatures only, no implementations
   - DI registration pattern for country strategies stubbed 
     (AddCountry<TRegistry,TStrategy>("HU") compiles, registers nothing real yet)
   - Frontend: minimal App shell that calls /api/health and renders the result; 
     Vite dev proxy configured to the API
   - One xUnit test that reads .claude/skills/hungarian-vat/assets/sample-clean.csv 
     from disk and asserts it has 10 data rows — this only proves test 
     infrastructure + fixture path resolution work; no parsing logic.

3. Tooling and hygiene:
   - .gitignore covering .NET, node, Vite, IDE files, .env; verify no bin/obj/ 
     node_modules get staged
   - .editorconfig with sensible C#/TS defaults
   - Dockerfile (multi-stage: node build → dotnet publish → runtime, API serving 
     the built frontend) and docker-compose.yml with the app + postgres:16, 
     healthcheck on postgres, env-var-based connection string, no secrets 
     committed
   - README.md skeleton with sections (leave TODO markers where content comes 
     later): Overview, Quick start (docker compose up), Demo credentials, 
     Architecture, Security, Extending to a new country, AI-assisted workflow

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA — verify each yourself before finishing:
- dotnet build succeeds with zero warnings-as-errors issues
- dotnet test passes
- docker compose up brings up postgres + app; /api/health reports DB connected
- npm run dev in frontend/ shows the health status from the API
- git status is clean of ignored artifacts

CONSTRAINTS
- Follow every naming and layering rule in the skill exactly; if anything in the 
  skill and this prompt conflict, the skill wins — tell me about the conflict 
  instead of silently choosing.
- If a decision isn't covered by the skill or PLAN.md, make the boring, 
  conventional choice and note it in a "Decisions made" list at the end.
- Conventional commits. Commit in logical units as you go (structure, backend 
  skeleton, frontend skeleton, docker, docs) — not one giant commit.
- When done: update the Phase 3 line in docs/PLAN.md to "in progress — skeleton 
  complete" in the final commit, and give me a summary of what exists, what's 
  stubbed, and what the next session should tackle.

1	# VATDesk — Project Plan
2	
3	Hungarian VAT (ÁFA) declaration generator. This document is the agreed implementation plan; domain
4	rules live in the project skill at `.claude/skills/hungarian-vat/`.
5	
6	## Locked decisions
7	
8	| Topic | Decision |
9	|---|---|
10	| Backend | ASP.NET Core 8 (LTS) Web API |
11	| Frontend | React 18 + TypeScript + Vite |
12	| Database | PostgreSQL, EF Core + Npgsql, migrations auto-applied on startup |
13	| PDF | QuestPDF (Community license) |
14	| Packaging | Multi-stage Dockerfile; docker-compose (app + postgres); single deployable unit (API serves built React app) |
15	| Deployment | Azure (Web App for Containers / Container Apps); Railway as fallback |
16	| Input formats | CSV (primary) + NAV 3.0-flavored XML; format by content sniffing |
17	| Declaration output | v1 = summary totals per VAT category, split OUT/IN, with net VAT payable (NOT the official 2465A form line structure) |
18	| Persistence | Aggregates + validation issues only; raw invoice
...(truncated)
```

</details>

1	# VATDesk Architecture & Conventions
2	
3	## Stack
4	
5	- Backend: ASP.NET Core 8 (LTS) Web API, EF Core + Npgsql, QuestPDF (Community license).
6	- Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite, served as static files by the API in
7	  production (single deployable unit).
8	- DB: PostgreSQL. Migrations applied automatically on startup.
9	- Packaging: multi-stage Dockerfile (node build → dotnet build → runtime image);
10	  docker-compose adds Postgres. Deployment target: Azure (Web App for Containers or
11	  Container Apps); Railway is the fallback.
12	
13	## Layering (enforced dependency direction: Api → Infrastructure → Core)
14	
15	```
16	src/
17	├── VatDesk.Core/            # zero external dependencies
18	│   ├── Models/              # TransactionLine, DeclarationSummary, VatCategory, ...
19	│   ├── Abstractions/        # IInvoiceParser, IVatCategoryRegistry,
20	│   │                        # IVatDeclarationStrategy, IReportRenderer
21	│   └── Validation/          # rule ids V1–V8, Vali
...(truncated)
```

</details>

```
1	# VATDesk Input Data Contract
2	
3	Two input formats are supported. Format is decided by content sniffing: a file whose
4	first non-whitespace character is `<` is treated as XML; otherwise CSV is attempted.
5	Extension is a hint, never the decider.
6	
7	## 1. CSV contract
8	
9	- Encoding: UTF-8 (accept BOM). Delimiter: comma. Header row **required**.
10	- Decimal separator: `.` — parse with invariant culture. Reject `,` decimals as a
11	  row error with a helpful message ("use 27000.50, not 27000,50").
12	- Dates: ISO `yyyy-MM-dd` only.
13	- Header matching: case-insensitive, order-independent. Unknown extra columns are
14	  ignored with a file-level info notice.
15	
16	### Columns
17	
18	| Column | Required | Rules |
19	|---|---|---|
20	| `InvoiceNumber` | yes | non-empty, ≤ 50 chars, trimmed |
21	| `IssueDate` | yes | `yyyy-MM-dd`, not in the future by more than 1 day |
22	| `PartnerName` | no | ≤ 200 chars |
23	| `PartnerTaxNumber` | no | if present: Hungarian format `8d-1d-2d` (e
...(truncated)
```

</details>

## User <sup>7/21/2026, 1:17:01 PM</sup>

```
1	# VAT Category Registry
2	
3	## Model
4	
5	```csharp
6	enum VatKind { Percentage, ZeroRated, Exempt, ReverseCharge }
7	
8	record VatCategory(
9	    string Code,            // stable identifier used in files, DB, API, UI
10	    VatKind Kind,
11	    decimal? Rate,          // only for Percentage/ZeroRated (0m for ZeroRated)
12	    string DisplayNameHu,
13	    string DisplayNameEn,
14	    int SortOrder);
15	
16	interface IVatCategoryRegistry
17	{
18	    string CountryCode { get; }          // "HU", "RO", ...
19	    IReadOnlyList<VatCategory> All { get; }
20	    bool TryGet(string code, out VatCategory category);
21	}
22	```
23	
24	The registry is the single source of truth for what codes exist. Parsers, validators,
25	aggregators, the API, the React UI, and the PDF renderer all consume it — never
26	hard-code category lists anywhere else. The API exposes it at
27	`GET /api/countries/{countryCode}/vat-categories` so the frontend renders categories
28	dynamically.
29	
30	## Hungarian regi
...(truncated)
```

</details>

  "content": "using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence.Entities;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence;\n\npublic class VatDeskDbContext(DbContextOptions<VatDeskDbContext> options) : DbContext(options)\n{\n    public DbSet<UserEntity> Users => Set<UserEntity>();\n    public DbSet<DeclarationEntity> Declarations => Set<DeclarationEntity>();\n    public DbSet<DeclarationCategoryTotalEntity> DeclarationCategoryTotals => Set<DeclarationCategoryTotalEntity>();\n    public DbSet<ValidationIssueEntity> ValidationIssues => Set<ValidationIssueEntity>();\n\n    protected override void OnModelCreating(ModelBuilder modelBuilder)\n    {\n        modelBuilder.Entity<UserEntity>(b =>\n        {\n            b.ToTable(\"users\");\n            b.HasKey(e => e.Id);\n            b.Property(e => e.Id).HasColumnName(\"id\");\n            b.Property(e => e.Email).HasColumnName(\"email\").IsRequired();\n            b.HasIndex(e => e.Email).IsUnique();\n            b.Property(e => e.PasswordHash).HasColumnName(\"password_hash\").IsRequired();\n            b.Property(e => e.Role).HasColumnName(\"role\").HasConversion<string>().IsRequired();\n            b.Property(e => e.CreatedAt).HasColumnName(\"created_at\");\n        });\n\n        modelBuilder.Entity<DeclarationEntity>(b =>\n        {\n            b.ToTable(\"declarations\");\n            b.HasKey(e => e.Id);\n            b.Property(e => e.Id).HasColumnName(\"id\");\n            b.Property(e => e.UserId).HasColumnName(\"user_id\");\n            b.Property(e => e.SourceFilename).HasColumnName(\"source_filename\").IsRequired();\n            b.Property(e => e.SourceFormat).HasColumnName(\"source_format\").HasConversion<string>().IsRequired();\n            b.Property(e => e.CountryCode).HasColumnName(\"country_code\").IsRequired();\n            b.Property(e => e.Status).Ha
...(truncated)

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Infrastructure/CountryServiceCollectionExtensions.cs",
  "content": "using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure;\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Registers a country's VAT category registry + declaration strategy under a country-code key.\n/// No real country implementation exists yet (Phase 3 next session); this only proves the seam.\n/// </summary>\npublic static class CountryServiceCollectionExtensions\n{\n    public static IServiceCollection AddCountry<TRegistry, TStrategy>(this IServiceCollection services, string countryCode)\n        where TRegistry : class, IVatCategoryRegistry\n        where TStrategy : class, IVatDeclarationStrategy\n    {\n        services.AddKeyedSingleton<IVatCategoryRegistry, TRegistry>(countryCode);\n        services.AddKeyedSingleton<IVatDeclarationStrategy, TStrategy>(countryCode);\n        return services;\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

</details>

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Api/Controllers/HealthController.cs",
  "content": "using System.Reflection;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing VatDesk.Api.Dtos;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Api.Controllers;\n\n[ApiController]\n[Route(\"api/[controller]\")]\npublic class HealthController(VatDeskDbContext dbContext) : ControllerBase\n{\n    [HttpGet]\n    public async Task<ActionResult<HealthResponse>> Get(CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n    {\n        var version = Assembly.GetExecutingAssembly().GetName().Version?.ToString() ?? \"unknown\";\n\n        bool databaseConnected;\n        try\n        {\n            databaseConnected = await dbContext.Database.CanConnectAsync(cancellationToken);\n        }\n        catch\n        {\n            databaseConnected = false;\n        }\n\n        return Ok(new HealthResponse(version, databaseConnected));\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

</details>

  "content": "using Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence;\n\nvar builder = WebApplication.CreateBuilder(args);\n\nbuilder.Services.AddControllers();\n\nbuilder.Services.AddDbContext<VatDeskDbContext>(options =>\n    options.UseNpgsql(builder.Configuration.GetConnectionString(\"Default\")));\n\n// Country strategies register here per country code once real implementations exist, e.g.:\n//   builder.Services.AddCountry<HungarianVatCategoryRegistry, HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy>(\"HU\");\n// Next session: HU registry + strategy + parsers land in VatDesk.Infrastructure.\n\nvar app = builder.Build();\n\nusing (var scope = app.Services.CreateScope())\n{\n    var dbContext = scope.ServiceProvider.GetRequiredService<VatDeskDbContext>();\n    dbContext.Database.Migrate();\n}\n\napp.UseHttpsRedirection();\n\napp.UseDefaultFiles();\napp.UseStaticFiles();\n\napp.UseAuthorization();\n\napp.MapControllers();\n\napp.MapFallbackToFile(\"index.html\");\n\napp.Run();\n\npublic partial class Program;\n"
}

No parsing logic yet —\n/// that lands with CsvInvoiceParser in a later session.\n/// </summary>\npublic class SampleCsvFixtureTests\n{\n    [Fact]\n    public void SampleCleanCsv_Has10DataRows()\n    {\n        var path = RepoRelativePath(\".claude/skills/hungarian-vat/assets/sample-clean.csv\");\n\n        var lines = File.ReadAllLines(path);\n        var dataRows = lines.Skip(1).Where(line => !string.IsNullOrWhiteSpace(line));\n\n        Assert.Equal(10, dataRows.Count());\n    }\n\n    private static string RepoRelativePath(string relativePath)\n    {\n        var dir = new DirectoryInfo(AppContext.BaseDirectory);\n        while (dir is not null && !File.Exists(Path.Combine(dir.FullName, \"VatDesk.sln\")))\n        {\n            dir = dir.Parent;\n        }\n\n        if (dir is null)\n        {\n            throw new InvalidOperationException(\n                \"Could not locate repository root (VatDesk.sln) from test base directory.\");\n        }\n\n        return Path.Combine(dir.FullName, relativePath);\n    }\n}\n"
}

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/frontend/src/App.tsx",
  "content": "import { useEffect, useState } from 'react'\nimport { getHealth } from './api/client'\nimport type { HealthResponse } from './api/types'\nimport './App.css'\n\ntype Status =\n  | { state: 'loading' }\n  | { state: 'error'; message: string }\n  | { state: 'success'; data: HealthResponse }\n\nfunction App() {\n  const [status, setStatus] = useState<Status>({ state: 'loading' })\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    getHealth()\n      .then((data) => setStatus({ state: 'success', data }))\n      .catch((error: Error) => setStatus({ state: 'error', message: error.message }))\n  }, [])\n\n  return (\n    <main className=\"app\">\n      <h1>VATDesk</h1>\n      <p className=\"subtitle\">Hungarian VAT declaration generator</p>\n\n      <section className=\"health-card\">\n        <h2>API health</h2>\n        {status.state === 'loading' && <p>Checking API…</p>}\n        {status.state === 'error' && <p className=\"error\">Error: {status.message}</p>}\n        {status.state === 'success' && (\n          <ul>\n            <li>Version: {status.data.version}</li>\n            <li>\n              Database:{' '}\n              <span className={status.data.databaseConnected ? 'ok' : 'error'}>\n                {status.data.databaseConnected ? 'connected' : 'disconnected'}\n              </span>\n            </li>\n          </ul>\n        )}\n      </section>\n    </main>\n  )\n}\n\nexport default App\n"
}
```

<summary>Tool: <code>Write</code></summary>

```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/Dockerfile",
  "content": "# syntax=docker/dockerfile:1\n\n# --- Stage 1: build the frontend ---\nFROM node:20-alpine AS frontend-build\nWORKDIR /frontend\nCOPY frontend/package*.json ./\nRUN npm ci\nCOPY frontend/ ./\nRUN npm run build\n\n# --- Stage 2: build & publish the API ---\nFROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/sdk:8.0 AS api-build\nWORKDIR /src\n\nCOPY VatDesk.sln ./\nCOPY src/VatDesk.Core/VatDesk.Core.csproj src/VatDesk.Core/\nCOPY src/VatDesk.Infrastructure/VatDesk.Infrastructure.csproj src/VatDesk.Infrastructure/\nCOPY src/VatDesk.Api/VatDesk.Api.csproj src/VatDesk.Api/\nCOPY tests/VatDesk.Tests/VatDesk.Tests.csproj tests/VatDesk.Tests/\nRUN dotnet restore src/VatDesk.Api/VatDesk.Api.csproj\n\nCOPY src/ src/\nRUN dotnet publish src/VatDesk.Api/VatDesk.Api.csproj -c Release -o /app/publish --no-restore\n\n# --- Stage 3: runtime ---\nFROM mcr.microsoft.com/dotnet/aspnet:8.0 AS runtime\nWORKDIR /app\n\nCOPY --from=api-build /app/publish ./\nCOPY --from=frontend-build /frontend/dist ./wwwroot\n\nENV ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://+:8080\nEXPOSE 8080\n\nENTRYPOINT [\"dotnet\", \"VatDesk.Api.dll\"]\n"
}
```

</details>

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/README.md",
  "content": "# VATDesk\n\nHungarian VAT (ÁFA) declaration generator. Ingests invoice/transaction files (CSV or\nNAV 3.0-style XML), validates them, aggregates amounts by Hungarian VAT category, and\nproduces a declaration summary — on-screen and as a PDF.\n\n<!-- TODO: one-paragraph pitch + screenshot once the UI is implemented (Phase 4) -->\n\n## Overview\n\n<!-- TODO: expand once parsing/validation/strategy/PDF land (Phase 3 continued) -->\n\n- Backend: ASP.NET Core 8 Web API (`src/VatDesk.Api`, `src/VatDesk.Infrastructure`,\n  `src/VatDesk.Core`)\n- Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite (`frontend/`), served as static files by the\n  API in production — single deployable unit\n- Database: PostgreSQL via EF Core + Npgsql; migrations apply automatically on startup\n- Country model: pluggable per-country VAT registry + declaration strategy; Hungary\n  (`HU`) is the only implemented country in v1\n\n## Quick start\n\n```bash\ndocker compose up --build\n```\n\nThis starts PostgreSQL and the app (API + built frontend served together) at\n`http://localhost:8080`. `GET /api/health` reports app version and DB connectivity.\n\nFor frontend hot-reload during development, run the API and the Vite dev server\nseparately:\n\n```bash\ndotnet run --project src/VatDesk.Api\ncd frontend && npm install && npm run dev\n```\n\nThe Vite dev server proxies `/api/*` to the API (see `frontend/vite.config.ts`).\n\n<!-- TODO: document required env vars (ConnectionStrings__Default, Jwt__Key) once auth lands -->\n\n## Demo credentials\n\n<!-- TODO: seed admin@demo.hu / viewer@demo.hu once auth is implemented (Phase 5) -->\n\n## Architecture\n\nLayering: `Api → Infrastructure → Core`, enforced by project references. `Core` has\nzero external dependencies.\n\n```\nsrc/\n├── VatDesk.Core/            # models, abstractions, validation — no external deps\n├── VatDesk.Infrastructure/  # EF Core persistence, parsers, country
...(truncated)
```

</details>

## Assistant <sup>7/21/2026, 1:34:20 PM</sup>

## Summary

Phase 3 walking skeleton is complete and verified — all acceptance criteria pass: `dotnet build` (0 warnings/errors), `dotnet test` (1/1 passing), `docker compose up` (postgres healthy, migrations auto-apply, `/api/health` reports DB connected, frontend served at root), `npm run dev` (Vite proxy → API → DB round-trips), and `git status` is clean with no build artifacts staged. 5 commits, in logical units.

**What exists:**
- `VatDesk.sln` with `src/VatDesk.Core` → `VatDesk.Infrastructure` → `VatDesk.Api` (.NET 8), `tests/VatDesk.Tests` (xUnit), `frontend/` (React 18 + TS + Vite) — layering enforced by project references, Core has zero external deps.
- Core: `TransactionLine`, `VatCategory`, `DeclarationSummary` models; `Direction`/`VatKind`/`UserRole`/`SourceFormat`/`DeclarationStatus` enums; `ValidationIssue` + `Severity` + rule-id constants (V1–V8); the four abstraction interfaces (`IInvoiceParser`, `IVatCategoryRegistry`, `IVatDeclarationStrategy`, `IReportRenderer`) as signatures only.
- Infrastructure: `VatDeskDbContext` with the four persistence tables (snake_case columns, enum-to-string conversions, FKs/indexes matching the skill's schema exactly), initial EF migration, and a generic `AddCountry<TRegistry,TStrategy>("HU")` DI stub (not yet called — no real HU implementation exists).
- Api: `GET /api/health` (version + DB connectivity via `CanConnectAsync`), migrations auto-apply on startup, serves the built frontend as static files (single deployable unit).
- Frontend: minimal App shell with loading/error/success states calling `/api/health`, `src/api/types.ts` mirroring the DTO, Vite dev proxy to the API.
- Docker: multi-stage Dockerfile (node build → dotnet publish → aspnet runtime), `docker-compose.yml` (app + postgres:16 with healthcheck, env-var connection string, `.env.example` for local overrides).
- `.gitignore`, `.editorconfig`, README skeleton with TODO markers, `docs/PLAN.md` Phase 3 line updated to "in progress — skeleton complete."

**What's stubbed / intentionally missing (next session):**
- No CSV/XML parsers, no HU category registry or declaration strategy, no PDF renderer, no validation rule implementations — `AddCountry<...>("HU")` is never invoked because there's nothing real to register yet.
- No auth (JWT/roles) — connection string env var is wired but no `Jwt__Key` yet since there's no auth code.
- Declarations/countries controllers don't exist yet — only `HealthController`.

**Decisions made (not specified in skill/plan, boring defaults chosen):**
- EF Core/Npgsql pinned to `8.0.11` (matches Npgsql's own dependency graph, avoids an MSB3277 version-conflict warning).
- Migrations tooling: `Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.Design` referenced by both Infrastructure and Api (standard `dotnet ef` pattern with `--startup-project`).
- Added `public partial class Program;` to `Program.cs` — standard boilerplate enabling `WebApplicationFactory<Program>` for integration tests in a later session.
- Dev-only default Postgres connection string in `appsettings.json` (`vatdesk`/`vatdesk` on localhost) — not a real secret, overridden by env var in Docker/Azure, consistent with the "no secrets committed" rule.

**No conflicts found** between the skill, `docs/PLAN.md`, and this prompt — architecture.md's file layout, persistence schema, and interface list were followed exactly.

**Next session should tackle:** CSV parser (`CsvInvoiceParser`) + NAV XML parser (with the mandated XXE hardening) against the skill's sample fixtures, `HungarianVatCategoryRegistry` + `HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy` with the V1–V8 validation rules, wiring `AddCountry<...>("HU")` for real, and the `POST /api/declarations` upload endpoint — using the golden values in `data-contract.md` as the test oracle.

Read CLAUDE.md, docs/PLAN.md, and the full hungarian-vat skill — SKILL.md plus 
ALL THREE reference files (data-contract.md, vat-categories.md, architecture.md) — 
before writing code. This session completes Phase 3: the entire backend domain, 
from file bytes to PDF, on top of the existing skeleton. Do not touch frontend/ 
beyond regenerating API types if you maintain them there.

Work in four stages, in order. Each stage ends with: tests green, one conventional 
commit, brief progress note. Do not start a stage before the previous one is green.

STAGE A — Category registry + canonical model + validation engine
- Implement VatCategory, VatKind, and HungarianVatCategoryRegistry exactly per 
  references/vat-categories.md (codes, kinds, rates, HU/EN display names, sort order).
- Implement TransactionLine and ValidationIssue per data-contract.md.
- Implement the validation engine: rules V1–V8 with the exact severities and the 
  ±1 HUF tolerance from the skill. Rules must be individually testable units, 
  ordered execution, each issue carrying row number, rule id, severity, and a 
  message with expected vs actual values.
- Tests: one test class per rule with passing and failing cases. Registry test: 
  exactly 8 codes, kinds and rates correct.

STAGE B — Parsers
- CsvInvoiceParser and NavXmlInvoiceParser per data-contract.md: header matching 
  rules, invariant culture, ISO dates, direction defaulting, XML element mapping, 
  vatPercentage→code mapping, vatExemption handling, inherited invoice header 
  fields, SourceRowNumber tracking.
- ParserFactory with content sniffing (first non-whitespace '<' ⇒ XML), extension 
  is only a hint.
- XML hardening is non-negotiable: DtdProcessing.Prohibit, XmlResolver = null, 
  character cap. Add a test that feeds an XML with a DOCTYPE/external entity and 
  asserts it is rejected.
- Tests parse the canonical fixtures from .claude/skills/hungarian-vat/assets/: 
  sample-clean.csv ⇒ 10 valid rows, zero issues; sample-invalid.csv ⇒ assert the 
  specific rule id triggered per row (each dirty row targets exactly one rule); 
  sample-nav.xml ⇒ 3 lines with correct codes including the TAM exemption line.

STAGE C — Declaration strategy + persistence
- HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy: aggregate error-free rows into 
  DeclarationSummary per data-contract.md section 5 (per-category × direction 
  totals, totalOutputVat, totalDeductibleInputVat, netVatPayable; warning rows 
  included in totals, error rows excluded; declared amounts used, never computed).
- Golden-value test: processing sample-clean.csv yields EXACTLY the table in 
  data-contract.md section 6 — outputVat 94300, inputVat 50600, netVatPayable 
  43700, and every per-category cell. If your numbers differ, your code is wrong, 
  not the skill.
- Persist Declaration + category totals + validation issues via the existing 
  schema; raw rows are NOT stored. Status: Completed / CompletedWithWarnings / 
  Failed per whether warnings/errors occurred.

STAGE D — PDF + API endpoints
- QuestPdfReportRenderer per the PDF section in architecture.md: A4, header, 
  summary cards, category table OUT-block then IN-block, validation summary, 
  disclaimer footer, page numbers. Community license configuration.
- Endpoints per architecture.md: POST /api/declarations (multipart, 5MB cap, 
  processes, persists, returns summary DTO), GET /api/declarations, 
  GET /api/declarations/{id}, GET /api/declarations/{id}/pdf (stream, correct 
  content type), GET /api/countries/{cc}/vat-categories.
- No auth in this session — leave endpoints anonymous with a TODO(Phase5) marker; 
  auth is the next phase and I don't want it half-done here.
- Controllers stay thin: validate → delegate → map. Any business rule found in a 
  controller is a defect.
- ProblemDetails for all error paths; unparseable file ⇒ 400 with a clear message, 
  not a 500.
- Integration-style test (WebApplicationFactory): upload sample-clean.csv, assert 
  200 with the golden totals; download PDF, assert non-empty application/pdf.

ACCEPTANCE — run all of it yourself before finishing:
- dotnet build + dotnet test fully green
- docker compose up, then via curl: upload sample-clean.csv ⇒ golden totals in the 
  JSON; upload sample-invalid.csv ⇒ CompletedWithWarnings/errors surfaced with rule 
  ids; upload the XXE test file ⇒ rejected; fetch the PDF ⇒ valid file
- No decimal→double anywhere (grep for 'double' in amount paths)

CONSTRAINTS

- Uncovered decisions: boring conventional choice + "Decisions made" list at end.
- Finish by updating docs/PLAN.md Phase 3 to complete (checkbox) in the final

```
services:
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-vatdesk}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-vatdesk}
      POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-vatdesk}
    volumes:
      - vatdesk-postgres-data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-vatdesk}"]
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 10
    ports:
      - "5433:5432"

  app:
    build:
      context: .
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      ConnectionStrings__Default: "Host=postgres;Port=5432;Database=${POSTGRES_DB:-vatdesk};Username=${POSTGRES_USER:-vatdesk};Password=${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-vatdesk}"
    depends_on:
      postgres:
        condition: service_healthy

volumes:
  vatdesk-postgres-data:
```

</details>

```
1	# VATDesk Input Data Contract
2	
3	Two input formats are supported. Format is decided by content sniffing: a file whose
4	first non-whitespace character is `<` is treated as XML; otherwise CSV is attempted.
5	Extension is a hint, never the decider.
6	
7	## 1. CSV contract
8	
9	- Encoding: UTF-8 (accept BOM). Delimiter: comma. Header row **required**.
10	- Decimal separator: `.` — parse with invariant culture. Reject `,` decimals as a
11	  row error with a helpful message ("use 27000.50, not 27000,50").
12	- Dates: ISO `yyyy-MM-dd` only.
13	- Header matching: case-insensitive, order-independent. Unknown extra columns are
14	  ignored with a file-level info notice.
15	
16	### Columns
17	
18	| Column | Required | Rules |
19	|---|---|---|
20	| `InvoiceNumber` | yes | non-empty, ≤ 50 chars, trimmed |
21	| `IssueDate` | yes | `yyyy-MM-dd`, not in the future by more than 1 day |
22	| `PartnerName` | no | ≤ 200 chars |
23	| `PartnerTaxNumber` | no | if present: Hungarian format `8d-1d-2d` (e
...(truncated)
```

</details>

1	# VAT Category Registry
2	
3	## Model
4	
5	```csharp
6	enum VatKind { Percentage, ZeroRated, Exempt, ReverseCharge }
7	
8	record VatCategory(
9	    string Code,            // stable identifier used in files, DB, API, UI
10	    VatKind Kind,
11	    decimal? Rate,          // only for Percentage/ZeroRated (0m for ZeroRated)
12	    string DisplayNameHu,
13	    string DisplayNameEn,
14	    int SortOrder);
15	
16	interface IVatCategoryRegistry
17	{
18	    string CountryCode { get; }          // "HU", "RO", ...
19	    IReadOnlyList<VatCategory> All { get; }
20	    bool TryGet(string code, out VatCategory category);
21	}
22	```
23	
24	The registry is the single source of truth for what codes exist. Parsers, validators,
25	aggregators, the API, the React UI, and the PDF renderer all consume it — never
26	hard-code category lists anywhere else. The API exposes it at
27	`GET /api/countries/{countryCode}/vat-categories` so the frontend renders categories
28	dynamically.
29	
30	## Hungarian regi
...(truncated)

1	# VATDesk Architecture & Conventions
2	
3	## Stack
4	
5	- Backend: ASP.NET Core 8 (LTS) Web API, EF Core + Npgsql, QuestPDF (Community license).
6	- Frontend: React 18 + TypeScript + Vite, served as static files by the API in
7	  production (single deployable unit).
8	- DB: PostgreSQL. Migrations applied automatically on startup.
9	- Packaging: multi-stage Dockerfile (node build → dotnet build → runtime image);
10	  docker-compose adds Postgres. Deployment target: Azure (Web App for Containers or
11	  Container Apps); Railway is the fallback.
12	
13	## Layering (enforced dependency direction: Api → Infrastructure → Core)
14	
15	```
16	src/
17	├── VatDesk.Core/            # zero external dependencies
18	│   ├── Models/              # TransactionLine, DeclarationSummary, VatCategory, ...
19	│   ├── Abstractions/        # IInvoiceParser, IVatCategoryRegistry,
20	│   │                        # IVatDeclarationStrategy, IReportRenderer
21	│   └── Validation/          # rule ids V1–V8, Vali
...(truncated)
```

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Infrastructure/Countries/Hu/HungarianVatCategoryRegistry.cs",
  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Models;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure.Countries.Hu;\n\n/// <summary>Hungarian VAT category registry; see hungarian-vat skill references/vat-categories.md.</summary>\npublic class HungarianVatCategoryRegistry : IVatCategoryRegistry\n{\n    public string CountryCode => \"HU\";\n\n    public IReadOnlyList<VatCategory> All { get; } =\n    [\n        new(\"27\", VatKind.Percentage, 0.27m, \"Általános kulcs (27%)\", \"Standard rate (27%)\", 1),\n        new(\"18\", VatKind.Percentage, 0.18m, \"Kedvezményes kulcs (18%)\", \"Reduced rate (18%)\", 2),\n        new(\"5\", VatKind.Percentage, 0.05m, \"Kedvezményes kulcs (5%)\", \"Reduced rate (5%)\", 3),\n        new(\"0\", VatKind.ZeroRated, 0.00m, \"Nulla kulcs\", \"Zero-rated\", 4),\n        new(\"AAM\", VatKind.Exempt, null, \"Alanyi adómentes\", \"Personal (subjective) exemption\", 5),\n        new(\"TAM\", VatKind.Exempt, null, \"Tárgyi adómentes\", \"Exempt activity\", 6),\n        new(\"EUFAD\", VatKind.ReverseCharge, null, \"EU-n belüli fordított adózás\", \"Intra-EU reverse charge\", 7),\n        new(\"FAD\", VatKind.ReverseCharge, null, \"Belföldi fordított adózás\", \"Domestic reverse charge\", 8),\n    ];\n\n    public bool TryGet(string code, out VatCategory category)\n    {\n        var match = All.FirstOrDefault(c => string.Equals(c.Code, code, StringComparison.Ordinal));\n        category = match!;\n        return match is not null;\n    }\n}\n"
}

  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Validation;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Countries.Hu;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Validation;\n\npublic class V2UnknownVatCodeTests\n{\n    private readonly HungarianVatCategoryRegistry _registry = new();\n\n    [Theory]\n    [InlineData(\"27\")]\n    [InlineData(\"AAM\")]\n    [InlineData(\"FAD\")]\n    public void KnownCode_ReturnsNoIssue_AndResolvesCategory(string code)\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(vatCode: code);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckVatCodeKnown(line, _registry, out var category);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n        Assert.NotNull(category);\n        Assert.Equal(code, category!.Code);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void UnknownCode_ReturnsV2Error_AndNullCategory()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(vatCode: \"99\", sourceRowNumber: 5);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckVatCodeKnown(line, _registry, out var category);\n\n        Assert.NotNull(issue);\n        Assert.Null(category);\n        Assert.Equal(ValidationRuleIds.UnknownVatCode, issue!.RuleId);\n        Assert.Equal(Severity.Error, issue.Severity);\n        Assert.Equal(5, issue.RowNumber);\n        Assert.Contains(\"99\", issue.Message);\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Validation;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Validation;\n\npublic class V3CurrencyTests\n{\n    [Theory]\n    [InlineData(\"HUF\")]\n    [InlineData(\"huf\")]\n    public void HufCurrency_CaseInsensitive_ReturnsNoIssue(string currency)\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(currency: currency);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckCurrencyIsHuf(line);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void NonHufCurrency_ReturnsV3Warning()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(currency: \"EUR\", sourceRowNumber: 10);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckCurrencyIsHuf(line);\n\n        Assert.NotNull(issue);\n        Assert.Equal(ValidationRuleIds.NonHufCurrency, issue!.RuleId);\n        Assert.Equal(Severity.Warning, issue.Severity);\n        Assert.Equal(10, issue.RowNumber);\n        Assert.Contains(\"EUR\", issue.Message);\n    }\n}\n"
}

  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Models;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Validation;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Validation;\n\npublic class V4ExemptVatAmountTests\n{\n    private static readonly VatCategory Aam = new(\"AAM\", VatKind.Exempt, null, \"Alanyi adómentes\", \"Personal exemption\", 5);\n    private static readonly VatCategory ZeroRated = new(\"0\", VatKind.ZeroRated, 0m, \"Nulla kulcs\", \"Zero-rated\", 4);\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void ExemptCode_ZeroVatAmount_ReturnsNoIssue()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(vatCode: \"AAM\", vatAmount: 0m, netAmount: 30000m, grossAmount: 30000m);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckExemptVatAmountIsZero(line, Aam);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void ZeroRatedCode_ZeroVatAmount_ReturnsNoIssue()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(vatCode: \"0\", vatAmount: 0m, netAmount: 120000m, grossAmount: 120000m);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckExemptVatAmountIsZero(line, ZeroRated);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void ExemptCode_NonZeroVatAmount_ReturnsV4Error()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(vatCode: \"AAM\", vatAmount: 8100m, netAmount: 30000m, grossAmount: 38100m, sourceRowNumber: 6);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckExemptVatAmountIsZero(line, Aam);\n\n        Assert.NotNull(issue);\n        Assert.Equal(ValidationRuleIds.NonZeroVatOnExemptCode, issue!.RuleId);\n        Assert.Equal(Severity.Error, issue.Severity);\n        Assert.Equal(6, issue.RowNumber);\n        Assert.Contains(\"8100\", issue.Message);\n    }\n}\n"
}

  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Models;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Validation;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Validation;\n\npublic class V5VatAmountMismatchTests\n{\n    private static readonly VatCategory Standard27 = new(\"27\", VatKind.Percentage, 0.27m, \"Általános kulcs (27%)\", \"Standard rate (27%)\", 1);\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void ExactMatch_ReturnsNoIssue()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(netAmount: 100000m, vatCode: \"27\", vatAmount: 27000m);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckVatAmountMatchesRate(line, Standard27);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void WithinOneHufTolerance_ReturnsNoIssue()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(netAmount: 100000m, vatCode: \"27\", vatAmount: 27001m);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckVatAmountMatchesRate(line, Standard27);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void OutsideTolerance_ReturnsV5Warning()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(netAmount: 100000m, vatCode: \"27\", vatAmount: 25000m, sourceRowNumber: 7);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckVatAmountMatchesRate(line, Standard27);\n\n        Assert.NotNull(issue);\n        Assert.Equal(ValidationRuleIds.VatAmountMismatch, issue!.RuleId);\n        Assert.Equal(Severity.Warning, issue.Severity);\n        Assert.Equal(7, issue.RowNumber);\n        Assert.Contains(\"25000\", issue.Message);\n        Assert.Contains(\"27000\", issue.Message);\n    }\n}\n"
}

  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/tests/VatDesk.Tests/Validation/V6GrossAmountMismatchTests.cs",
  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Validation;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Validation;\n\npublic class V6GrossAmountMismatchTests\n{\n    [Fact]\n    public void ExactMatch_ReturnsNoIssue()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(netAmount: 100000m, vatAmount: 27000m, grossAmount: 127000m);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckGrossAmountMatchesNetPlusVat(line);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void WithinOneHufTolerance_ReturnsNoIssue()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(netAmount: 100000m, vatAmount: 27000m, grossAmount: 127001m);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckGrossAmountMatchesNetPlusVat(line);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void OutsideTolerance_ReturnsV6Warning()\n    {\n        var line = TestLines.Valid(netAmount: 100000m, vatAmount: 27000m, grossAmount: 130000m, sourceRowNumber: 8);\n\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckGrossAmountMatchesNetPlusVat(line);\n\n        Assert.NotNull(issue);\n        Assert.Equal(ValidationRuleIds.GrossAmountMismatch, issue!.RuleId);\n        Assert.Equal(Severity.Warning, issue.Severity);\n        Assert.Equal(8, issue.RowNumber);\n        Assert.Contains(\"127000\", issue.Message);\n        Assert.Contains(\"130000\", issue.Message);\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

}

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Infrastructure/Parsing/ContentSniffing.cs",
  "content": "using System.Text;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure.Parsing;\n\n/// <summary>Format detection: a file whose first non-whitespace character is '&lt;' is XML; otherwise CSV.</summary>\ninternal static class ContentSniffing\n{\n    public static bool FirstNonWhitespaceCharIsLessThan(Stream content)\n    {\n        if (!content.CanSeek)\n        {\n            throw new ArgumentException(\"Content stream must be seekable for format sniffing.\", nameof(content));\n        }\n\n        var originalPosition = content.Position;\n        try\n        {\n            content.Position = 0;\n            using var reader = new StreamReader(content, Encoding.UTF8, detectEncodingFromByteOrderMarks: true, leaveOpen: true);\n            int ch;\n            while ((ch = reader.Read()) != -1)\n            {\n                if (!char.IsWhiteSpace((char)ch))\n                {\n                    return (char)ch == '<';\n                }\n            }\n\n            return false;\n        }\n        finally\n        {\n            content.Position = originalPosition;\n        }\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

</details>

  "content": "using System.Globalization;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure.Parsing;\n\n/// <summary>Shared invariant-culture field parsing for row-level values, with expected-vs-actual error text.</summary>\ninternal static class FieldParsing\n{\n    public static bool TryParseInvariantDecimal(string raw, out decimal value, out string? error)\n    {\n        value = default;\n        var trimmed = raw.Trim();\n        if (trimmed.Length == 0)\n        {\n            error = \"is required\";\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        if (!decimal.TryParse(trimmed, NumberStyles.AllowDecimalPoint | NumberStyles.AllowLeadingSign, CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, out value))\n        {\n            error = trimmed.Contains(',')\n                ? $\"must use '.' as the decimal separator, not ',' (use 27000.50, not 27000,50; got '{trimmed}')\"\n                : $\"must be a valid decimal (got '{trimmed}')\";\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        error = null;\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    public static bool TryParseNonNegativeDecimal(string raw, out decimal value, out string? error)\n    {\n        if (!TryParseInvariantDecimal(raw, out value, out error))\n        {\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        if (value < 0m)\n        {\n            error = $\"must be >= 0 (got {value.ToString(CultureInfo.InvariantCulture)})\";\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        return true;\n    }\n\n    public static bool TryParseIsoDate(string raw, out DateOnly value, out string? error)\n    {\n        value = default;\n        var trimmed = raw.Trim();\n        if (trimmed.Length == 0)\n        {\n            error = \"is required\";\n            return false;\n        }\n\n        if (!DateOnly.TryParseExact(trimmed, \"yyyy-MM-dd\", CultureInfo.InvariantCulture, DateTimeStyles.None, out value))\n        {\n            error = $\"m

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Infrastructure/Parsing/ParserFactory.cs",
  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure.Parsing;\n\n/// <summary>Picks the right IInvoiceParser by content sniffing and enforces the file-level size cap.</summary>\npublic class ParserFactory(IEnumerable<IInvoiceParser> parsers)\n{\n    public const long MaxFileSizeBytes = 5 * 1024 * 1024;\n\n    public async Task<ParseResult> ParseAsync(Stream content, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n    {\n        if (!content.CanSeek)\n        {\n            throw new ArgumentException(\"Content stream must be seekable.\", nameof(content));\n        }\n\n        if (content.Length == 0)\n        {\n            throw new InvoiceParseException(\"The uploaded file is empty.\");\n        }\n\n        if (content.Length > MaxFileSizeBytes)\n        {\n            throw new InvoiceParseException(\"The uploaded file exceeds the 5 MB limit.\");\n        }\n\n        content.Position = 0;\n        var parser = parsers.FirstOrDefault(p => p.CanParse(content))\n            ?? throw new InvoiceParseException(\"The uploaded file is neither valid CSV nor valid NAV XML.\");\n\n        content.Position = 0;\n        return await parser.ParseAsync(content, cancellationToken);\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

  "content": "namespace VatDesk.Tests;\n\n/// <summary>Resolves paths into .claude/skills/hungarian-vat/assets/ regardless of test runner CWD.</summary>\ninternal static class SkillFixtures\n{\n    public static string Path(string relativeAssetPath) =>\n        System.IO.Path.Combine(RepoRoot(), \".claude/skills/hungarian-vat/assets\", relativeAssetPath);\n\n    public static Stream OpenRead(string relativeAssetPath) => File.OpenRead(Path(relativeAssetPath));\n\n    private static string RepoRoot()\n    {\n        var dir = new DirectoryInfo(AppContext.BaseDirectory);\n        while (dir is not null && !File.Exists(System.IO.Path.Combine(dir.FullName, \"VatDesk.sln\")))\n        {\n            dir = dir.Parent;\n        }\n\n        if (dir is null)\n        {\n            throw new InvalidOperationException(\"Could not locate repository root (VatDesk.sln) from test base directory.\");\n        }\n\n        return dir.FullName;\n    }\n}\n"
}

  "content": "using System.Text;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Parsing;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Parsing;\n\npublic class ParserFactoryTests\n{\n    private readonly ParserFactory _factory = new([new CsvInvoiceParser(), new NavXmlInvoiceParser()]);\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task CsvContent_SniffedAndParsedAsCsv()\n    {\n        await using var stream = SkillFixtures.OpenRead(\"sample-clean.csv\");\n\n        var result = await _factory.ParseAsync(stream);\n\n        Assert.Equal(10, result.Lines.Count);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task XmlContent_SniffedAndParsedAsXml()\n    {\n        await using var stream = SkillFixtures.OpenRead(\"sample-nav.xml\");\n\n        var result = await _factory.ParseAsync(stream);\n\n        Assert.Equal(3, result.Lines.Count);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task LeadingWhitespaceBeforeXmlDeclaration_StillSniffedAsXml()\n    {\n        var xml = \"   \\n\\t<?xml version=\\\"1.0\\\"?><InvoiceData xmlns=\\\"http://schemas.nav.gov.hu/OSA/3.0/data\\\"><invoiceNumber>X</invoiceNumber><invoiceIssueDate>2026-01-01</invoiceIssueDate><invoiceLines></invoiceLines></InvoiceData>\";\n        using var stream = new MemoryStream(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(xml));\n\n        var result = await _factory.ParseAsync(stream);\n\n        Assert.Empty(result.Lines);\n        Assert.Empty(result.Issues);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task EmptyFile_Throws()\n    {\n        using var stream = new MemoryStream();\n\n        await Assert.ThrowsAsync<InvoiceParseException>(() => _factory.ParseAsync(stream));\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task OversizedFile_Throws()\n    {\n        using var stream = new MemoryStream(new byte[ParserFactory.MaxFileSizeBytes + 1]);\n\n        await Assert.ThrowsAsync<InvoiceParseException>(() => _factory.ParseAsync(stream));\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\
...(truncated)

  "content": "namespace VatDesk.Core.Models;\n\n/// <summary>Derives the persisted declaration status from a built DeclarationSummary's validation counts.</summary>\npublic static class DeclarationStatusCalculator\n{\n    public static DeclarationStatus FromValidation(ValidationSummary validation)\n    {\n        if (validation.ValidRows == 0 && validation.WarningRows == 0 && validation.ErrorRows > 0)\n        {\n            return DeclarationStatus.Failed;\n        }\n\n        return validation.WarningRows > 0 || validation.ErrorRows > 0\n            ? DeclarationStatus.CompletedWithWarnings\n            : DeclarationStatus.Completed;\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Infrastructure/Countries/Hu/HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy.cs",
  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Models;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Validation;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure.Countries.Hu;\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Aggregates error-free rows into a DeclarationSummary per data-contract.md section 5.\n/// Rows with errors (from the parser's V1 issues or this run's V2-V8 issues) are excluded\n/// from totals; rows with only warnings are included using their declared amounts.\n/// </summary>\npublic class HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy(IVatCategoryRegistry registry) : IVatDeclarationStrategy\n{\n    public string CountryCode => \"HU\";\n\n    public DeclarationSummary BuildDeclaration(IReadOnlyList<TransactionLine> lines, IReadOnlyList<ValidationIssue> parserIssues)\n    {\n        var validatorIssues = TransactionLineValidator.Validate(lines, registry);\n        var allIssues = parserIssues.Concat(validatorIssues).ToList();\n\n        var issuesByRow = allIssues\n            .Where(i => i.RowNumber != 0) // exclude file-level notices from per-row classification\n            .GroupBy(i => i.RowNumber)\n            .ToDictionary(g => g.Key, g => g.ToList());\n\n        var errorRowNumbers = issuesByRow\n            .Where(kv => kv.Value.Any(i => i.Severity == Severity.Error))\n            .Select(kv => kv.Key)\n            .ToHashSet();\n\n        var includedLines = lines.Where(l => !errorRowNumbers.Contains(l.SourceRowNumber)).ToList();\n\n        var perCategory = includedLines\n            .GroupBy(l => (l.VatCode, l.Direction))\n            .Select(g => new CategoryTotal(\n                g.Key.VatCode,\n                g.Key.Direction,\n                g.Count(),\n                g.Sum(l => l.NetAmount),\n                g.Sum(l => l.VatAmount),\n                g.Sum(l => l.GrossAmount)))\n            .OrderBy(c => c.Direction) // Out (0) before In (1)\n         
...(truncated)
```

</details>

  "old_string": "        var errorRowNumbers = issuesByRow\n            .Where(kv => kv.Value.Any(i => i.Severity == Severity.Error))\n            .Select(kv => kv.Key)\n            .ToHashSet();\n\n        var includedLines = lines.Where(l => !errorRowNumbers.Contains(l.SourceRowNumber)).ToList();",
  "new_string": "        var errorRowNumbers = issuesByRow\n            .Where(kv => kv.Value.Any(i => i.Severity == Severity.Error))\n            .Select(kv => kv.Key)\n            .ToHashSet();\n\n        // V3 (non-HUF currency) is a Warning but data-contract.md marks it \"row skipped from\n        // totals\" — unlike other warnings (V5/V6/V7/V8), which use their declared amounts.\n        var nonHufRowNumbers = issuesByRow\n            .Where(kv => kv.Value.Any(i => i.RuleId == ValidationRuleIds.NonHufCurrency))\n            .Select(kv => kv.Key)\n            .ToHashSet();\n\n        var excludedFromTotals = errorRowNumbers.Union(nonHufRowNumbers).ToHashSet();\n        var includedLines = lines.Where(l => !excludedFromTotals.Contains(l.SourceRowNumber)).ToList();"
}

  "content": "using System.Globalization;\nusing QuestPDF.Fluent;\nusing QuestPDF.Helpers;\nusing QuestPDF.Infrastructure;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Models;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Validation;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure.Pdf;\n\n/// <summary>\n/// A4 declaration summary PDF per architecture.md's PDF section: header, summary cards,\n/// category table (OUT block then IN block), validation summary, disclaimer footer, page numbers.\n/// </summary>\npublic class QuestPdfReportRenderer : IReportRenderer\n{\n    private static readonly NumberFormatInfo HufFormat = new()\n    {\n        NumberGroupSeparator = \" \",\n        NumberDecimalDigits = 0,\n    };\n\n    public Task<byte[]> RenderAsync(DeclarationSummary summary, DeclarationMetadata metadata, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)\n    {\n        var document = Document.Create(container =>\n        {\n            container.Page(page =>\n            {\n                page.Size(PageSizes.A4);\n                page.Margin(36);\n                page.DefaultTextStyle(x => x.FontSize(10));\n\n                page.Header().Element(c => ComposeHeader(c, metadata));\n                page.Content().Element(c => ComposeContent(c, summary));\n                page.Footer().Element(ComposeFooter);\n            });\n        });\n\n        return Task.FromResult(document.GeneratePdf());\n    }\n\n    private static void ComposeHeader(QuestPDF.Infrastructure.IContainer container, DeclarationMetadata metadata)\n    {\n        container.PaddingBottom(10).BorderBottom(1).BorderColor(Colors.Grey.Lighten2).Column(column =>\n        {\n            column.Item().Text(\"VATDesk — VAT Declaration Summary\").FontSize(16).Bold();\n            column.Item().Text($\"Declaration ID: {metadata.DeclarationId}\").FontSize(9).FontColor(Colors.Grey.Darken1);\n            column.Item().Text(
...(truncated)

  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Models;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence.Entities;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Api.Dtos;\n\ninternal static class DtoMapping\n{\n    public static VatCategoryDto ToDto(this VatCategory category) => new(\n        category.Code,\n        category.Kind.ToString(),\n        category.Rate,\n        category.DisplayNameHu,\n        category.DisplayNameEn,\n        category.SortOrder);\n\n    /// <summary>\n    /// Category total order is not persisted (composite PK has no sequence column), so it's\n    /// re-derived here from the registry: OUT block then IN block, by category SortOrder —\n    /// the same rule HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy applies when it first builds the summary.\n    /// </summary>\n    public static DeclarationDto ToDto(this DeclarationEntity entity, IVatCategoryRegistry registry) => new(\n        entity.Id,\n        entity.SourceFilename,\n        entity.SourceFormat.ToString(),\n        entity.CountryCode,\n        entity.Status.ToString(),\n        entity.CreatedAt,\n        entity.CategoryTotals\n            .OrderBy(c => c.Direction)\n            .ThenBy(c => registry.TryGet(c.VatCode, out var category) ? category.SortOrder : int.MaxValue)\n            .Select(c => new CategoryTotalDto(c.VatCode, c.Direction.ToString(), c.RowCount, c.TotalNet, c.TotalVat, c.TotalGross))\n            .ToList(),\n        entity.TotalOutputVat,\n        entity.TotalInputVat,\n        entity.NetVatPayable,\n        new ValidationSummaryDto(\n            entity.ValidRows,\n            entity.WarningRows,\n            entity.ErrorRows,\n            entity.ValidationIssues\n                .OrderBy(i => i.RowNumber)\n                .ThenBy(i => i.RuleId, StringComparer.Ordinal)\n                .Select(i => new ValidationIssueDto(i.RowNumber, i.RuleId, i.Severity.ToString(), i.Message))\n               
...(truncated)

---

## Assistant <sup>7/21/2026, 2:27:15 PM</sup>

<details>
<summary>Tool: <code>Write</code></summary>

```json
{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Infrastructure/Persistence/Repositories/DeclarationEntityExtensions.cs",
  "content": "using VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Models;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Validation;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence.Entities;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence.Repositories;\n\n/// <summary>Reconstructs the Core DeclarationSummary shape from a persisted entity (e.g. for PDF rendering).</summary>\npublic static class DeclarationEntityExtensions\n{\n    public static DeclarationSummary ToSummary(this DeclarationEntity entity, IVatCategoryRegistry registry)\n    {\n        var perCategory = entity.CategoryTotals\n            .OrderBy(c => c.Direction)\n            .ThenBy(c => registry.TryGet(c.VatCode, out var category) ? category.SortOrder : int.MaxValue)\n            .Select(c => new CategoryTotal(c.VatCode, c.Direction, c.RowCount, c.TotalNet, c.TotalVat, c.TotalGross))\n            .ToList();\n\n        var issues = entity.ValidationIssues\n            .OrderBy(i => i.RowNumber)\n            .ThenBy(i => i.RuleId, StringComparer.Ordinal)\n            .Select(i => new ValidationIssue(i.RowNumber, i.RuleId, i.Severity, i.Message))\n            .ToList();\n\n        return new DeclarationSummary(\n            perCategory,\n            entity.TotalOutputVat,\n            entity.TotalInputVat,\n            entity.NetVatPayable,\n            new ValidationSummary(entity.ValidRows, entity.WarningRows, entity.ErrorRows, issues));\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

</details>

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Api/Controllers/CountriesController.cs",
  "content": "using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\nusing VatDesk.Api.Dtos;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Api.Controllers;\n\n[ApiController]\n[Route(\"api/countries\")]\npublic class CountriesController(IServiceProvider serviceProvider) : ControllerBase\n{\n    // TODO(Phase5): require any authenticated user once JWT auth lands.\n    [HttpGet(\"{countryCode}/vat-categories\")]\n    public ActionResult<IReadOnlyList<VatCategoryDto>> GetVatCategories(string countryCode)\n    {\n        var registry = serviceProvider.GetKeyedService<IVatCategoryRegistry>(countryCode.ToUpperInvariant());\n        if (registry is null)\n        {\n            return Problem(\n                title: \"Unknown country code\",\n                detail: $\"No VAT category registry is registered for country code '{countryCode}'.\",\n                statusCode: StatusCodes.Status404NotFound);\n        }\n\n        var categories = registry.All.OrderBy(c => c.SortOrder).Select(c => c.ToDto()).ToList();\n        return Ok(categories);\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

</details>

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/src/VatDesk.Api/ErrorHandling/GlobalExceptionHandler.cs",
  "content": "using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Diagnostics;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Api.ErrorHandling;\n\n/// <summary>\n/// Catches anything a controller didn't handle explicitly and returns a generic ProblemDetails\n/// response — full exception detail is logged server-side, never sent to the client.\n/// </summary>\npublic class GlobalExceptionHandler(ILogger<GlobalExceptionHandler> logger) : IExceptionHandler\n{\n    public async ValueTask<bool> TryHandleAsync(HttpContext httpContext, Exception exception, CancellationToken cancellationToken)\n    {\n        logger.LogError(exception, \"Unhandled exception processing {Method} {Path}\", httpContext.Request.Method, httpContext.Request.Path);\n\n        httpContext.Response.StatusCode = StatusCodes.Status500InternalServerError;\n        httpContext.Response.ContentType = \"application/problem+json\";\n\n        await httpContext.Response.WriteAsJsonAsync(\n            new ProblemDetails\n            {\n                Status = StatusCodes.Status500InternalServerError,\n                Title = \"An unexpected error occurred.\",\n                Type = \"https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc7231#section-6.6.1\",\n            },\n            cancellationToken);\n\n        return true;\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

</details>

  "content": "using System.Text;\nusing QuestPDF.Infrastructure;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Models;\nusing VatDesk.Core.Validation;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Pdf;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Pdf;\n\npublic class QuestPdfReportRendererTests\n{\n    static QuestPdfReportRendererTests() => Settings.License = LicenseType.Community;\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task RenderAsync_ProducesNonEmptyValidPdf()\n    {\n        var renderer = new QuestPdfReportRenderer();\n        var summary = new DeclarationSummary(\n            PerCategory: [new CategoryTotal(\"27\", Direction.Out, 1, 100000m, 27000m, 127000m)],\n            TotalOutputVat: 27000m,\n            TotalDeductibleInputVat: 0m,\n            NetVatPayable: 27000m,\n            Validation: new ValidationSummary(1, 0, 0, [new ValidationIssue(0, ValidationRuleIds.FileNotice, Severity.Info, \"info\")]));\n        var metadata = new DeclarationMetadata(Guid.NewGuid(), \"sample-clean.csv\", DateTimeOffset.UtcNow);\n\n        var bytes = await renderer.RenderAsync(summary, metadata);\n\n        Assert.NotEmpty(bytes);\n        Assert.Equal(\"%PDF\", Encoding.ASCII.GetString(bytes, 0, 4));\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public async Task RenderAsync_EmptyCategoryList_StillProducesValidPdf()\n    {\n        var renderer = new QuestPdfReportRenderer();\n        var summary = new DeclarationSummary([], 0m, 0m, 0m, new ValidationSummary(0, 0, 0, []));\n        var metadata = new DeclarationMetadata(Guid.NewGuid(), \"empty.csv\", DateTimeOffset.UtcNow);\n\n        var bytes = await renderer.RenderAsync(summary, metadata);\n\n        Assert.Equal(\"%PDF\", Encoding.ASCII.GetString(bytes, 0, 4));\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

  "content": "using Microsoft.AspNetCore.Hosting;\nusing Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing;\nusing Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Api;\n\n/// <summary>Boots the real Program with the EF Core InMemory provider swapped in for Postgres,\n/// so integration tests don't require a running database.</summary>\npublic class VatDeskWebApplicationFactory : WebApplicationFactory<Program>\n{\n    private readonly string _databaseName = Guid.NewGuid().ToString();\n\n    protected override void ConfigureWebHost(IWebHostBuilder builder)\n    {\n        builder.ConfigureServices(services =>\n        {\n            services.RemoveAll<DbContextOptions<VatDeskDbContext>>();\n            services.AddDbContext<VatDeskDbContext>(options => options.UseInMemoryDatabase(_databaseName));\n        });\n    }\n}\n"
}

## Assistant <sup>7/21/2026, 2:32:44 PM</sup>

Found a real DI bug: `HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy` takes a plain `IVatCategoryRegistry`, but only a *keyed* "HU" registry is registered — .NET DI won't auto-resolve keyed dependencies through implicit constructor injection. Let me fix the `AddCountry` extension to wire this explicitly.


---

## Assistant <sup>7/21/2026, 2:32:44 PM</sup>

```

## User <sup>7/21/2026, 2:32:44 PM</sup>

<details>
<summary>Tool Result</summary>

```
1	using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;
2	using VatDesk.Core.Abstractions;
3	
4	namespace VatDesk.Infrastructure;
5	
6	/// <summary>
7	/// Registers a country's VAT category registry + declaration strategy under a country-code key.
8	/// No real country implementation exists yet (Phase 3 next session); this only proves the seam.
9	/// </summary>
10	public static class CountryServiceCollectionExtensions
11	{

{
  "command": "cd /Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk\ngit commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfeat: :sparkles: implement PDF renderer and declaration/country API endpoints\n\nQuestPdfReportRenderer (Community license): A4 summary with header,\ntotals cards, category table (OUT block then IN block), validation\nissue table, disclaimer footer, page numbers. Amounts render space-\ngrouped (\"1 270 000 Ft\") via an explicit NumberFormatInfo rather than\nrelying on hu-HU culture data being present in the runtime image.\n\nDeclarationsController (POST/GET/GET by id/GET pdf) and\nCountriesController (GET vat-categories) per architecture.md's API\nsurface. Controllers stay thin: parse -> strategy -> repository ->\nDTO, no business logic. ProblemDetails everywhere via a global\nIExceptionHandler; InvoiceParseException maps to 400, anything else\nto a generic 500 with full detail logged server-side only. Upload\nsize is capped both via [RequestSizeLimit] and FormOptions, plus an\nextension allow-list, on top of ParserFactory's existing 5 MB/content\nchecks. No auth this session — endpoints are anonymous with\nTODO(Phase5) markers for the eventual role policies.\n\nFixed a real DI bug surfaced by the integration tests: AddCountry\nregistered the strategy as a keyed singleton, but its constructor\ntakes a plain (unkeyed) IVatCategoryRegistry — .NET DI doesn't thread\nkeyed services through implicit constructor injection, so it now\nresolves the keyed registry explicitly via ActivatorUtilities.\n\nParseResult now carries which format was actually parsed (content-\nsniffed truth), since the API needs it for persistence and the\nfilename extension alone isn't reliable.\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"",
  "description": "Commit Stage D"
}

## Assistant <sup>7/21/2026, 2:37:47 PM</sup>

Live testing surfaced a real correctness issue: NAV XML invoices with multiple lines share one `InvoiceNumber` by design (inherited from the header), but my V8 duplicate-detection treats every line after the first as a "duplicate" — which is a false positive for legitimate multi-line invoices. Let me fix this properly.

  "old_string": "    [Fact]\n    public void SameInvoiceNumber_DifferentDirection_ReturnsNoIssue()\n    {\n        var seen = new HashSet<(string, Direction)>();\n        var outLine = TestLines.Valid(invoiceNumber: \"INV-1\", direction: Direction.Out);\n        var inLine = TestLines.Valid(invoiceNumber: \"INV-1\", direction: Direction.In);\n\n        TransactionLineValidator.CheckDuplicateInvoiceNumber(outLine, seen);\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckDuplicateInvoiceNumber(inLine, seen);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n}",
  "new_string": "    [Fact]\n    public void SameInvoiceNumber_DifferentDirection_ReturnsNoIssue()\n    {\n        var seen = new HashSet<(string, Direction)>();\n        var outLine = TestLines.Valid(invoiceNumber: \"INV-1\", direction: Direction.Out);\n        var inLine = TestLines.Valid(invoiceNumber: \"INV-1\", direction: Direction.In);\n\n        TransactionLineValidator.CheckDuplicateInvoiceNumber(outLine, seen);\n        var issue = TransactionLineValidator.CheckDuplicateInvoiceNumber(inLine, seen);\n\n        Assert.Null(issue);\n    }\n\n    [Fact]\n    public void Validate_CheckDuplicateInvoiceNumbersFalse_SuppressesV8ForMultiLineInvoices()\n    {\n        var registry = new VatDesk.Infrastructure.Countries.Hu.HungarianVatCategoryRegistry();\n        IReadOnlyList<TransactionLine> lines =\n        [\n            TestLines.Valid(invoiceNumber: \"INV-XML-1\", direction: Direction.Out, sourceRowNumber: 5),\n            TestLines.Valid(invoiceNumber: \"INV-XML-1\", direction: Direction.Out, sourceRowNumber: 12),\n        ];\n\n        var issues = TransactionLineValidator.Validate(lines, registry, checkDuplicateInvoiceNumbers: false);\n\n        Assert.DoesNotContain(issues, i => i.RuleId == ValidationRuleIds.DuplicateInvoiceNumber);\n    }\n}"
}
```

<summary>Tool: <code>Bash</code></summary>

```json
{
  "command": "cd /Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk\ngit commit -m \"$(cat <<'EOF'\nfix: :bug: suppress false-positive V8 duplicates for multi-line NAV XML invoices\n\nLive acceptance testing (uploading sample-nav.xml through the running\nAPI) surfaced a real bug: a NAV XML file holds exactly one invoice per\ndata-contract.md, and all of its lines legitimately inherit the same\nInvoiceNumber + Direction from the header. V8's per-line duplicate\ncheck flagged every line after the first as a false-positive\n\"duplicate\", even though they're normal line items of one invoice.\n\nTransactionLineValidator.Validate gains a checkDuplicateInvoiceNumbers\nflag (default true), and IVatDeclarationStrategy.BuildDeclaration now\ntakes the SourceFormat so HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy can pass\nfalse for NavXml. CSV is unaffected (one row = one record, where V8\nduplicate detection is meaningful).\n\nAlso updates frontend/src/api/types.ts to mirror the Stage D DTOs\n(VatCategoryDto, DeclarationDto, DeclarationListItemDto, etc.), per\nthe \"types mirror API DTOs 1:1\" convention — no other frontend changes.\n\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>\nEOF\n)\"",
  "description": "Commit the V8 fix and frontend types"
}
```

</details>

## Assistant <sup>7/21/2026, 2:42:29 PM</sup>

## Summary

Phase 3 backend is complete, all four stages green, verified live against `docker compose up` + curl. 6 commits, in stage order.

**What was built** (69 tests, 0 warnings):
- **Stage A**: `HungarianVatCategoryRegistry` (exact 8 codes/kinds/rates/names/order) + `TransactionLineValidator` running V2–V8 as independently testable static checks.
- **Stage B**: `CsvInvoiceParser` (CsvHelper-backed) and `NavXmlInvoiceParser` (hardened: `DtdProcessing.Prohibit`, `XmlResolver = null`, char cap) + `ParserFactory` with content sniffing. Both own V1 (malformed rows are format-specific, can't become a typed `TransactionLine`).
- **Stage C**: `HungarianVatDeclarationStrategy` — golden values match exactly (94,300 / 50,600 / 43,700). `DeclarationRepository` persists aggregates + issues only, no raw rows.
- **Stage D**: `QuestPdfReportRenderer`, `DeclarationsController`, `CountriesController`, global `ProblemDetails` error handling. No auth — anonymous with `TODO(Phase5)` markers.

**Deviations / conflicts surfaced** (per your "skill wins, don't reconcile silently" instruction):
1. `Declaration.UserId` is now nullable — no auth exists this session, so uploads are anonymous. Becomes required in Phase 5.
2. V7 (partner tax number format) is hardcoded HU/EU regex inside the shared validator — `vat-categories.md`'s registry model has no seam for country-specific validation beyond VAT codes. Extending to RO will need this pulled out.
3. Used ASP.NET Core's built-in keyed DI (`[FromKeyedServices("HU")]`) instead of building a dedicated `ICountryResolver` (architecture.md mentions one) — keyed DI already satisfies both the hard-default and the `{cc}`-route-param cases without an extra abstraction.
4. **Real bug caught by live testing, not by unit tests**: NAV XML invoices share one `InvoiceNumber` across all their lines by design, which made V8 (duplicate detection) false-positive on every multi-line XML invoice. Fixed by threading `SourceFormat` into `BuildDeclaration` and skipping V8 for XML sources — documented with a regression test and a code comment explaining why.

**What Phase 4 needs** — final DTO shapes (`frontend/src/api/types.ts` already mirrors these):
```ts
DeclarationDto: { id, sourceFilename, sourceFormat, countryCode, status, createdAt,
  perCategory: CategoryTotalDto[], totalOutputVat, totalDeductibleInputVat, netVatPayable,
  validation: ValidationSummaryDto }
DeclarationListItemDto: { id, sourceFilename, sourceFormat, countryCode, status,
  totalOutputVat, totalDeductibleInputVat, netVatPayable, validRows, warningRows, errorRows, createdAt }
VatCategoryDto: { code, kind, rate, displayNameHu, displayNameEn, sortOrder }
```
Endpoints: `POST /api/declarations` (multipart, field name `file`) → 200 `DeclarationDto`; `GET /api/declarations` → `DeclarationListItemDto[]`; `GET /api/declarations/{id}` → `DeclarationDto`; `GET /api/declarations/{id}/pdf` → `application/pdf`; `GET /api/countries/{cc}/vat-categories` → `VatCategoryDto[]`. All errors are RFC7807 `application/problem+json`.

## User <sup>7/21/2026, 2:49:49 PM</sup>

Read CLAUDE.md, docs/PLAN.md, the hungarian-vat skill (SKILL.md + 
references/architecture.md, especially the security checklist and API surface), 
and study docs/design/ thoroughly — open the exported design for the Login screen 
and the app shell/dashboard before writing any frontend code. This session is the 
first vertical slice of Phase 4: authentication + authorization end-to-end, the 
Login page, and a placeholder Home/Dashboard behind it.

DESIGN FIDELITY COMMITMENT (applies to this and all future frontend sessions)
docs/design/ is the single source of truth for visual output. Concretely:
- Extract the design tokens (colors, typography, spacing, radii, shadows) from 
  the design export into a central theme file (CSS variables or theme object) in 
  this session — every component consumes tokens, never hard-coded values. All 
  future pages will reuse this file, so name and organize it accordingly. Consider using chadcn for this step. Also implement theme light/dark selection with button to change.
- Match the Login screen from the design pixel-conscientiously: layout, hierarchy, 
  the demo-credentials hint box, the secondary "Continue with Microsoft/Google" 
  buttons not needed for now, simply ignore them.
- Implement every state the design defines for login: default, loading (submit 
  pending), invalid credentials error, and validation of empty fields.
- Where the design export includes reusable components (buttons, inputs, cards), 
  build them as shared components in frontend/src/components/ui/ now — the rest 
  of Phase 4 will consume them.
- If something is ambiguous or missing in the design, choose the minimal 
  interpretation consistent with the design's visual language and list it under 
  "Design gaps" at the end — do not invent new visual styles.

STAGE A — Backend auth (replaces the TODO(Phase5) markers)
- Seeded users per the skill: admin@demo.hu / Admin123! (Admin), 
  viewer@demo.hu / Viewer123! (Viewer). Passwords hashed (ASP.NET Identity 
  PasswordHasher or BCrypt) in the seed migration — no plaintext at rest.
- POST /api/auth/login: validates credentials, returns short-lived JWT (HS256, 
  signing key from env var / user-secrets, never committed; fail fast at startup 
  if the key is missing or shorter than 32 bytes) with role claim + display name. 
  Add GET /api/auth/me returning the current principal for session restore.
- Wire authentication + authorization middleware. Role policies per the skill's 
  API table: POST /api/declarations ⇒ Admin only; declaration reads + PDF + 
  vat-categories ⇒ any authenticated user; health stays anonymous.
- Rate limiting on /api/auth/login (tight window) per security checklist item 6.
- 401 vs 403 must be correct and return ProblemDetails.
- Tests: login success (token contains role claim), login failure (401, generic 
  message — never "user not found" vs "wrong password"), Viewer calling POST 
  /api/declarations ⇒ 403, anonymous calling GET /api/declarations ⇒ 401, 
  rate limiter triggers after N rapid attempts.

STAGE B — Frontend auth infrastructure
- Auth context/store: holds token + user (name, role); token kept in memory with 
  sessionStorage persistence for refresh survival — document this tradeoff in a 
  code comment (XSS surface vs UX; acceptable for demo scope).
- API client wrapper: attaches Authorization header, on 401 clears session and 
  redirects to /login preserving the intended destination.
- Route guards: unauthenticated ⇒ /login; role-aware guard component 
  (RequireRole) ready for later pages even though only Admin/any-auth exist now.
- Mirror DTO types from the Phase 3 summary into frontend/src/api/types.ts 
  (auth DTOs added).

STAGE C — Pages
- /login: per the design, per the fidelity commitment above. On success route to 
  intended destination or /.
- / (Home/Dashboard placeholder): app shell from the design — header with app 
  name, user's display name, role badge, logout — and an empty-state content area 
  matching the design's dashboard empty state ("no declarations yet" + a 
  "New declaration" primary button visible ONLY for Admin role, non-functional 
  with "Coming soon" tooltip). This shell (layout, nav, header) must be the 
  reusable frame every subsequent page mounts into.
- Logout: clears session, returns to /login.

ACCEPTANCE — verify yourself:
- dotnet test green including new auth tests; frontend builds with zero TS errors
- docker compose up ⇒ full flow in browser: /login renders per design, wrong 
  password shows error state, admin login lands on dashboard with "New 
  declaration" visible, viewer login hides it, refresh keeps you logged in, 
  logout works, deep link to / while logged out bounces to /login and back after 
  login
- curl: Viewer token POSTing /api/declarations gets 403; no token gets 401

CONSTRAINTS
- Skill wins on conflict; surface conflicts. Boring choices + "Decisions made" 
  list for anything uncovered.
- UI role-gating is cosmetic; server-side policies are the enforcement (skill 
  hard rule). Never skip the server check because the UI hides a button.
- Conventional commits per stage. Final commit: restructure docs/PLAN.md — mark 
  Phase 5 baseline (JWT + roles) as done and folded into this slice, keep 
  "Entra ID (stretch)" as its own unchecked line, and add Phase 4 sub-checkboxes: 
  [x] 4.1 auth+login+shell, [ ] 4.2 upload, [ ] 4.3 report view, [ ] 4.4 
  dashboard/history. End with: what exists, design gaps found, and what 4.2 
  needs.

  "content": "using System.IdentityModel.Tokens.Jwt;\nusing System.Security.Claims;\nusing System.Text;\nusing Microsoft.Extensions.Options;\nusing Microsoft.IdentityModel.Tokens;\nusing VatDesk.Infrastructure.Persistence.Entities;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Api.Auth;\n\npublic interface IJwtTokenService\n{\n    (string Token, DateTimeOffset ExpiresAt) IssueToken(UserEntity user);\n}\n\npublic class JwtTokenService(IOptions<JwtOptions> options) : IJwtTokenService\n{\n    public (string Token, DateTimeOffset ExpiresAt) IssueToken(UserEntity user)\n    {\n        var opts = options.Value;\n        var expiresAt = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow.AddMinutes(opts.ExpiryMinutes);\n\n        var claims = new[]\n        {\n            new Claim(JwtRegisteredClaimNames.Sub, user.Id.ToString()),\n            new Claim(ClaimTypes.NameIdentifier, user.Id.ToString()),\n            new Claim(ClaimTypes.Email, user.Email),\n            new Claim(ClaimTypes.Name, user.DisplayName),\n            new Claim(ClaimTypes.Role, user.Role.ToString()),\n        };\n\n        var key = new SymmetricSecurityKey(Encoding.UTF8.GetBytes(opts.Key));\n        var credentials = new SigningCredentials(key, SecurityAlgorithms.HmacSha256);\n\n        var token = new JwtSecurityToken(\n            issuer: opts.Issuer,\n            audience: opts.Audience,\n            claims: claims,\n            expires: expiresAt.UtcDateTime,\n            signingCredentials: credentials);\n\n        return (new JwtSecurityTokenHandler().WriteToken(token), expiresAt);\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

</details>

{
  "file_path": "/Users/mariuscretu/Documents/repos/VATDesk/tests/VatDesk.Tests/Api/TestAuth.cs",
  "content": "using System.Net.Http.Headers;\nusing System.Net.Http.Json;\nusing VatDesk.Api.Dtos;\n\nnamespace VatDesk.Tests.Api;\n\ninternal static class TestAuth\n{\n    public const string AdminEmail = \"admin@demo.hu\";\n    public const string AdminPassword = \"Admin123!\";\n    public const string ViewerEmail = \"viewer@demo.hu\";\n    public const string ViewerPassword = \"Viewer123!\";\n\n    public static async Task<string> LoginAsync(HttpClient client, string email, string password)\n    {\n        var response = await client.PostAsJsonAsync(\"/api/auth/login\", new LoginRequestDto(email, password));\n        response.EnsureSuccessStatusCode();\n        var body = await response.Content.ReadFromJsonAsync<LoginResponseDto>();\n        return body!.Token;\n    }\n\n    public static async Task<HttpClient> CreateAuthenticatedClientAsync(VatDeskWebApplicationFactory factory, string email, string password)\n    {\n        var client = factory.CreateClient();\n        var token = await LoginAsync(client, email, password);\n        client.DefaultRequestHeaders.Authorization = new AuthenticationHeaderValue(\"Bearer\", token);\n        return client;\n    }\n}\n"
}
```

</details>

84	builder.Services.AddRateLimiter(options =>
85	{
86	    options.RejectionStatusCode = StatusCodes.Status429TooManyRequests;

88	        partitionKey: httpContext.Connection.RemoteIpAddress?.ToString() ?? "unknown",
89	        factory: _ => new FixedWindowRateLimiterOptions
90	        {
91	            PermitLimit = 5,
92	            Window = TimeSpan.FromMinutes(1),
